name: zutil_zrdr_add_search_paths
description: zUtil::ZRDR_AddSearchPaths appends existing semicolon-delimited paths, skips missing paths, and avoids duplicates.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zUtil::ZRDR_AddSearchPaths: 132 unmasked mismatches after masking 56 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 188 bytes and the VC object body is 176 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed byte drift is broad control-flow/source-shape drift in the search-path tokenization loop; the functional smoke verifies existing-path insertion, missing-path skipping, duplicate suppression, and push-front order.
